task_completion.description: Agent accesses the visitor management records dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening the visitor records dataset in a spreadsheet application, text editor, or writing a script to read the data.

task_completion.description: Agent filters the records for December 2025 and 'Contractor' badge type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the data being filtered for the month of December 2025 and the badge type 'Contractor', either via GUI filters, spreadsheet formulas, or code.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies the contractors who stayed strictly more than 120 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent calculating stay durations and isolating the 3 specific violators: Maria Garcia, Jessica Harris, and Margaret Allen.

task_completion.description: Agent formats the report with the required columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the preparation of the final report containing the required columns: visitor name, company, sign-in time, sign-out time, and stay duration.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the final report to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file being saved or exported to '/home/ga/Desktop/contractor_overstay_dec2025.csv'.

integrity.description: The agent actually processes the dataset rather than hallucinating the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the original visitor records dataset or executing a script/command that reads it.

integrity.description: The agent derives the violators from the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not simply type out the names Maria Garcia, Jessica Harris, and Margaret Allen without first querying or filtering the dataset.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely creates the CSV file at the correct location.
integrity.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal command confirms the creation of '/home/ga/Desktop/contractor_overstay_dec2025.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly 3 contractors who overstayed the 120-minute limit in December 2025: Maria Garcia (Deloitte LLP, 150 mins), Jessica Harris (ExxonMobil, 180 mins), and Margaret Allen (IBM Corporation, 150 mins). The final output must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/contractor_overstay_dec2025.csv and include visitor name, company, sign-in time, sign-out time, and stay duration.
